description: In this episode, Haseeb discusses his role as a managing partner at Dragonfly, a multibillion-dollar crypto venture fund, and shares insights on various crypto investments and debates, including a notable discussion on Ethereum's future.
topic_summary: Haseeb, managing partner at Dragonfly, shares insights on crypto investments and debates, including Ethereum's potential and market dynamics [t=0:16-1:20]. He reflects on past debates and the evolution of the crypto space [t=90:82-159:92].
